goal: The operational documentation a non-author needs to run and trust the unified Sophia + invoicing system: admin runbook, env reference, and the agent allowlist.
why: The invoicing + Sophia bridge shipped to production but is undocumented; only the author can operate it. These admin-only docs turn a shipped feature into an owned, maintainable system before Final QA and Handoff.
success_criteria: docs/admin/invoicing-runbook.md exists and covers the invoice lifecycle, all 11 Sophia intents, the bridge request path, and the two-Supabase-project topology (vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx + tijadsdysuxkxrpdlecq).
docs/admin/invoicing-env-reference.md documents every invoicing/bridge/access env var name, its purpose, runtime (Vercel vs. Supabase Edge), and read location in one place.
docs/admin/invoicing-allowlist.md documents INVOICE_AUTHORIZED_AGENTS, both enforcement points, and the add/remove maintenance procedure with redeploy steps.
No secret VALUES committed in any of the three docs; variable names and locations only.
The three docs cross-link each other by relative path.

tasks.title: Admin runbook
acceptance_criteria: A non-author can explain which Supabase project holds invoices vs. app data, how an invoice moves from draft to paid/receipt, and which WhatsApp phrases trigger which Sophia action.

Lists every Sophia invoicing intent (create_draft, list_drafts, query_status, approve, edit_invoice, request_correction, mark_paid, issue_receipt, issue_credit_note, resend, send_pdf) with the triggering agent phrase and the result.

Documents the request path: WhatsApp -> manageInvoice tool (sophia-bot, allowlist check) -> invoice-bridge.ts (HMAC sign) -> POST /api/sophia/intent (HMAC verify + allowlist re-check) -> runIntent -> invoice DB tijadsdysuxkxrpdlecq + PDF bucket.
Names the two Supabase projects by ref: primary vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx (sophia-bot, agents, listings) and invoice tijadsdysuxkxrpdlecq (invoice documents).
tasks.action: Create docs/admin/invoicing-runbook.md (admin-panel-guide.md convention) with sections: two-Supabase topology (server.ts:18, schema.ts:11-23); request path/bridge (invoice.ts:43, invoice-bridge.ts:41, route.ts:36,52); lifecycle (invoice.ts:7-16,24; approve intent-handlers.ts:187-223; mark-paid :310-324; credit note :326-348); 11-intent table (intent-handlers.ts:17-28 + invoicing.ts:38-47); group notify (whatsapp-status.ts:24). Cross-link env + allowlist docs.

tasks.title: Env reference
acceptance_criteria: Every env var referenced by the invoicing + bridge + access-gate code appears in one table: name, purpose, runtime (Vercel vs. Supabase Edge), required/optional, and the file:line that reads it.

Covers at minimum INVOICE_SUPABASE_URL, INVOICE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE, SOPHIA_BRIDGE_SECRET, SOPHIA_BRIDGE_URL, ADMIN_ACCESS_CODE, INVOICES_ACCESS_CODE, AUTH_SECRET, INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN, SUPABASE_INVOICE_BUCKET, WASENDER_API_KEY, WASENDER_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN, WASENDER_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

States SOPHIA_BRIDGE_SECRET must hold the same value in both runtimes (Vercel + Supabase Edge) for HMAC to verify, and INVOICE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE is server-only (never NEXT_PUBLIC_, never client-imported).
No secret VALUES appear; only names, purposes, and locations.
tasks.action: Create docs/admin/invoicing-env-reference.md: one Variable|Purpose|Runtime|Required|Read-at table covering INVOICE_SUPABASE_URL + INVOICE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE (server.ts:7,18,19), SOPHIA_BRIDGE_SECRET (route.ts:13 + invoice-bridge.ts:16; both runtimes must match), SOPHIA_BRIDGE_URL (invoice-bridge.ts:14), access codes + AUTH_SECRET (gate.ts:17,39,40), INVOICE_ACCOUNTING_GROUP_MSISDN (whatsapp-status.ts:25), SUPABASE_INVOICE_BUCKET (schema.ts:26), WASENDER keys. Add rotation note; names only.

tasks.title: Allowlist documentation + maintenance procedure
acceptance_criteria: Names the current allowlist (Fawzi Goussous, Charalambos Pitros, Marios Polyviou) and explains matching is by the last 8 digits of the agent's MSISDN.

Identifies BOTH enforcement points and that they must stay in sync: lib/invoices/constants.ts (INVOICE_AUTHORIZED_AGENTS, used by /api/sophia/intent) and supabase/functions/sophia-bot/tools/handlers/invoice.ts (ALLOWED_LAST8, the in-bot gate).
Provides numbered add-an-agent and remove-an-agent procedures including redeploy steps (vercel --prod for the constant; supabase functions deploy sophia-bot for the bot gate).
States the defense-in-depth rationale (re-check in route.ts:52) and that an unauthorized number gets a generic deflection that never reveals the allowlist.
tasks.action: Create docs/admin/invoicing-allowlist.md. Sections: who is on it (constants.ts:10-14, last-8 :20-25); two enforcement points in sync (Vercel gate constants.ts:10->route.ts:52, deflection :54-57, documents.ts:130; in-bot invoice.ts:27 ALLOWED_LAST8->isAllowed :29 before :43); add-agent steps (edit both gates + prompt invoicing.ts:28, deploy vercel --prod AND supabase functions deploy sophia-bot); remove-agent (reverse+both deploys). Cross-link runbook+env.
